name: Spacer
summary: A flexible, `aria-hidden` filler that absorbs free space inside a `Stack` (any direction), pushing siblings apart — the typed replacement for `sx={{ flexGrow: 1 }}` / margin-auto hacks in toolbars and bars. `grow` sets how much space it takes (default 1).

props.name: grow
props.description: Grow factor; how much free space this filler absorbs. Default 1.

bestPractices: Drop a `<Spacer/>` between groups in an HStack to push them to opposite ends (e.g. title on the left, actions on the right).
Use multiple Spacers with different `grow` values to distribute free space proportionally.
Prefer `justify='between'` when you simply want two groups at the edges; reach for Spacer when the split is uneven or there are 3+ groups.
